APPEARANCES- ATTY. CINDY LEE, TEL. NO. 752-6070 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KATIE DANIELSON OF THE BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO, TEL. NO. 865-9211 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY DIANNE LEDBETTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT DIANNE LEDBETTER'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS DENIED, FAILED TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING WITH THE MOTION.
